texto: We live in a culture right now that pits girls against each other. We are brought up socially to be in competition with each other -who has the best body, more boyfriends, better clothes. And this kind of competition can be devastating on female friendships because it emphasizes a mentality that there isn’t enough to go around, Enough love. Enough attention. Enough success. But there is . There is enough to share with your girlfriends.
explicacao: Citação de Jessica Weiner sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “We live in a culture right now that pits girls against each other. We are brought up socially to …” articula amizade, bully, girls em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e girls.
